abilities.description: Abaddon releases a coil of deathly mist that can damage an enemy unit or heal a friendly unit at the cost of some of Abaddon's health.
abilities.name: Mist Coil
abilities.story: A mysterious vapor from the Font of Avernus now infuses the breath of Abaddon, who releases it at will.

abilities.description: Summons dark energies around an ally unit, creating a shield that absorbs a set amount of damage before expiring. When the shield is destroyed it will burst and deal damage equal to the amount it could absorb to an area around it. Removes certain types of negative buffs and stuns on cast.
abilities.name: Aphotic Shield
abilities.story: The powers of the black mist rise to absorb attacks like the black mist absorbs light.

abilities.description: Abaddon strikes an enemy, slowing the target's movement speed. If the target gets hit 4 times, they become affected by a chilling curse causing them to be silenced and slowed, and all attacks against them gain an attack speed boost. Damage over time component to buildings is multiplied by 0.7.
abilities.name: Curse of Avernus
abilities.story: While the baptized draw strength from the Font, the gifts of Avernus are debilitating to the uninitiated.

abilities.description: When activated, all damage dealt to you will heal instead of harm. Most negative buffs will also be removed. If the ability is not on cooldown, it will automatically activate if your health falls below 400.
params: Passive ComponentPassive Health Threshold: 400[picture:aghanim's_scepter_symbol] Mist Coil Radius: [picture:aoe_radius_symbol] 1200[picture:aghanim's_scepter_symbol] Mist Coil Trigger Health Threshold: 525[picture:aghanim's_scepter_symbol] Aura Linger Duration: 0.5 ([picture:talent_tree_symbol] 0.5)
abilities.name: Borrowed Time
abilities.story: The most unnatural of all the gifts of the Font of Avernus, this power defies mortal understanding. What should hurt, instead heals; and what should kill gives strength anew.

description: Shields his allies or himself from attacks. Unlike the other scions of his house, Abaddon drank deeper than any from the prophetic vapors that flowed from the Font of Avernus. Now a being of unnatural powers, Abaddon stifles his foes by spreading the Curse of Avernus, and releases deathly double-edged Mist Coils to damage adversaries and heal allies. The black mist swirls around his compatriots, forming an Aphotic Shield that absorbs attacks before bursting in a wide radius. But the Font's greatest gift is revealed only in the desperation of battle. Bestowed with Borrowed Time, Abaddon charges the enemy ranks, riding down foes with his cursed blade, his health returning with each welcoming blow. For all that was meant to kill did nothing but make the Lord of Avernus even more formidable.  Support Carry Durable  Blue, Cape, Steed, Nose Legs ( 2 )
trivia: Abaddon's title, Lord of Avernus, is a reference to the famous crater in Italy, which was, in ancient times, believed to be the entrance to the underworld.

hero_talents.talent_right: +80 Curse of Avernus Attack Speed Bonus
